product_data.title: RTX 3090 Recertified — 24GB VRAM, BTCPC Mine-Tested 300h
product_data.description: Professionally recertified RTX 3090 24GB. Tested 300 hours on Ollama Qwen2.5:14B. Includes chain-verified compute certificate. Replaced thermal paste, original cooler. 90-day BTCPC escrow buyer protection.

product_data.title: BTCPC Mining Starter Guide — Getting Started with Ollama, Epochs, and Rewards
product_data.description: 20-page PDF guide for new BTCPC miners. Covers: installing Ollama, choosing a model, staking basics, reading your reward stream, and avoiding common mistakes. Instant delivery via BTCPC-FS CID in your order confirmation.

product_data.title: T-Beam v1.2 Mesh Kit — LoRa 915MHz, BTCPC Firmware, GPS, 3dBi Antenna
product_data.description: T-Beam v1.2 pre-flashed with BTCPC sensor firmware. Plug in and start earning sensor relay rewards immediately. Includes USB-C cable, 3dBi external antenna, and quick-start card. Ships within 24h.

product_data.question: Does this work with PCIe 3.0 x16 slots?

product_data.answer: Yes — PCIe 3.0 x16 works fine, you lose less than 3% bandwidth vs Gen 4. All Ollama models up to 14B run at full speed.
